description: v1.2.1 explanation fix log: corrected explanation strings for the 97 HALLUCINATED public-split entries whose stored explanations were stale generation-pipeline re-classifier output. Drafted and adversarially verified against CrossRef/arXiv/DBLP records (2026-07-22). Labels, types, tiers, and sub-tests unchanged. Applied by scripts/fix_stale_explanations.py, which also sets the 36 stale VALID explanations to the ground-truth audit relabel_reason.

fixes.explanation: Real survey published in JMLR (vol. 20) in 2019; cited here with year 2021.
fixes.old_explanation: [Re-classified] No match in CrossRef (best title sim=65). Completely fabricated paper. (Original prompt logged in generation script)
fixes.evidence: jmlr.org/papers/v20/18-598.html: 'Thomas Elsken, Jan Hendrik Metzen, Frank Hutter; 20(55):1-21, 2019', title 'Neural Architecture Search: A Survey'.

fixes.explanation: Real paper published at IJCAI 2019 (DOI 10.24963/ijcai.2019/815); cited here as NeurIPS 2022.
fixes.old_explanation: [Re-classified] Title matches (sim=100), authors match (jacc=1.00), but venue differs: 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)' vs 'Proceedings of the Twenty-Eighth International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence' (Original prompt logged in generation script)
fixes.evidence: CrossRef API bibliographic search: 'CounterFactual Regression with Importance Sampling Weights' by Hassanpour and Greiner, Proceedings of the 28th IJCAI (2019), DOI 10.24963/ijcai.2019/815; entry lists booktitle NeurIPS, year 2022, matching venue_correct=false, authors_match=true, title_exists=true.

fixes.explanation: Author list replaced: the real paper is by Yan-Bo Lin, Yi-Lin Sung, Jie Lei, Mohit Bansal, and Gedas Bertasius

fixes.evidence: CrossRef DOI 10.1109/cvpr52729.2023.00228 (CVPR 2023): real authors are Lin, Sung, Lei, Bansal, Bertasius — entirely different from the given author list
